ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's chosen name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's encrypted password */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "country" TEXT /* User's country of residence */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or about section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the movie was released */,
  "genre" INTEGER /* Genre of the movie */,
  "director" INTEGER /* Director of the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Length of the movie in minutes */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "rating_count" INTEGER /* Number of ratings the movie has received */,
  "synopsis" TEXT /* Brief summary of the movie */,
  "poster_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie's poster */,
  "trailer_url" TEXT /* URL of the movie's trailer */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDb ID of the movie */,
  "tmdb_id" TEXT /* TMDB ID of the movie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES movie_genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movies_director FOREIGN KEY ("director") REFERENCES directors ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being rated */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review if the user provided one */,
  "is_spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the director */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the director's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre the user prefers */,
  "preference_score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the user's preference for the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES movie_genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is being recommended the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being recommended */,
  "recommendation_score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was generated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the recommendation (e.g., algorithm, curator, friend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "total_ratings" INTEGER /* Total number of ratings the movie has received */,
  "weekly_views" INTEGER /* Number of views the movie received in the past week */,
  "monthly_views" INTEGER /* Number of views the movie received in the past month */,
  "yearly_views" INTEGER /* Number of views the movie received in the past year */,
  "trending_score" REAL /* Score indicating how trendy the movie is */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_trends_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the movie */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie that was viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was viewed */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view (e.g., full watch, preview) */,
  "view_duration" REAL /* Duration of the view in minutes */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the view (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_views_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_watchlists" (
  "watchlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each watchlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie added to the watchlist */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the movie was added to the watchlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("watchlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlists_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_watchlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "is_spoiler" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review contains spoilers */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the review has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the review has received */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user in the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)
